detaileddescription.para: Pass::Pass wrapper for using either pass or the pass imitation.
Initializes the pass wrapper environment.

briefdescription.para: Initialize Git repository in password store.
Pull changes from remote Git repository.
Push changes to remote Git repository.

parameterdescription.para: Path to password file relative to store root.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString srcDir, const QString dest, const bool force=false)=0
memberdef.name: Move

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString srcDir, const QString dest, const bool force=false)=0
memberdef.name: Copy

briefdescription.para: Search password content for a pattern.

detaileddescription.para: Pass::Generate use either pwgen or internal password generator.

briefdescription.para: Generate GPG keys using batch script.

detaileddescription.para: Pass::GenerateGPGKeys internal gpg keypair generator . .
Pass::listKeys list users.
Pass::listKeys list users.
Update the process environment used for executing external commands.

Updates environment entries for PASSWORD_STORE_SIGNING_KEY, PASSWORD_STORE_DIR, PASSWORD_STORE_GENERATED_LENGTH, and PASSWORD_STORE_CHARACTER_SET based on current settings, then applies the environment to the internal executor.

briefdescription.para: Check if GPG supports Ed25519 encryption.

detaileddescription.para: Pass::gpgSupportsEd25519 check if GPG supports ed25519 (ECC) GPG 2.1+ supports ed25519 which is much faster for key generation.

briefdescription.para: Get default key template for new GPG keys.

detaileddescription.para: Pass::getDefaultKeyTemplate return default key generation template Uses ed25519 if supported, otherwise falls back to RSA.

briefdescription.para: Resolve the gpgconf command to kill agents.

simplesect.para: Resolved command with program and arguments.

briefdescription.para: Get .gpg-id file path for a password file.

detaileddescription.para: Pass::getGpgIdPath return gpgid file path for some file (folder).

parameterdescription.para: which file (folder) would you like the gpgid file path for.

briefdescription.para: Get list of recipients for a password file.

detaileddescription.para: Pass::getRecipientList return list of gpg-id's to encrypt for.

parameterdescription.para: which file (folder) would you like recipients for

detaileddescription.para: Pass::getRecipientString formatted string for use with GPG.

parameterdescription.para: which file (folder) would you like recipients for

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS id, const QString &app, const QStringList &args, bool readStdout=true, bool readStderr=true)
memberdef.name: executeWrapper

detaileddescription.para: Executes a wrapper command.
Generates a random password from the given charset.

parameterdescription.para: Characters to use in the password

detaileddescription.para: Generates a random number bounded by the given value.

briefdescription.para: Set or remove an environment variable.

detaileddescription.para: Pass::setEnvVar set or remove a single environment variable.

key
Variable name including trailing '='.
value
New value; empty string removes the variable.
key
Variable name including trailing '=' (e.g. "FOO=").
value
Value to set; pass an empty string to remove the variable.
Set or remove a single environment variable in the local env list.

The provided key must include a trailing '=' (e.g. "FOO="). Existing entries whose text begins with the given key are removed before the new value is applied. If value is non-empty the pair "key+value" is appended; if value is empty the variable is removed.
The function asserts if key does not end with '='; if the assertion is not active it will emit a warning and return without modifying env.

parameterdescription.para: Environment variable name with trailing '=' (anchors the lookup).
Value to set for the variable; an empty string unsets the variable.

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS id, const QString &app, const QStringList &args, QString input, bool readStdout=true, bool readStderr=true)
memberdef.name: executeWrapper

memberdef.argsstring: (int id, int exitCode, const QString &out, const QString &err)
memberdef.name: finished

detaileddescription.para: Pass::processFinished reemits specific signal based on what process has finished.

parameterdescription.para: id of Pass process that was scheduled and finished
output generated by process(if capturing was requested, empty otherwise)
error output generated by process(if capturing was requested, or error occurred)

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS pid, int exitCode, const QString &out, const QString &err)
memberdef.name: handleProcessError

briefdescription.para: Emit the appropriate finished signal for a completed subprocess.

detaileddescription.para: Emits a specific Qt signal corresponding to the given process identifier; for grep results the stdout is parsed into a list of matches before emitting.

parameterdescription.para: The process identifier indicating which finished signal to emit.
Standard output produced by the process.
Standard error produced by the process.

briefdescription.para: Emitted when a process error occurs.
Emitted when GPG key generation finishes.
Emitted when grep finishes with matching results.
Abstract base class for password store operations.

detaileddescription.para:
Pass provides an abstraction layer for password management, supporting both the native 'pass' utility and gopass/imitation backends. It handles:
Password file operations (show, insert, remove, move, copy)
GPG key management and Git integration
OTP generation
Random password generation
Subclasses must implement Git and password operations.
